items.title: Israel says new head of Hamas' military wing killed in Gaza City strikes
items.summary: At least three people were killed in the attacks, which came despite a ceasefire with Hamas being in place.

items.title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
items.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" the Iran-backed group.

items.title: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
items.summary: Nasa plans to send hopping drones and roving vehicles to the Moon as part of plans for a permanent Moon base.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 日航空服員飲酒超標延誤航班 186名旅客受影響
items.summary: 日本航空（JAL）日前宣布，一名原定執勤廣島飛往羽田航班的空服員，在執飛前的酒精檢測中被驗出酒精濃度超過規定，因而被取消執飛資格，此事件並導致該航班發生延誤，影響186名旅客的後...…

items.title: 烏軍「暴風影」飛彈夜襲克里米亞 俄怒控英法提供武器
items.summary: 烏克蘭週三（27日）深夜發射英法製造的「暴風影」（Storm Shadow）巡弋飛彈協同無人機，對俄羅斯克里米亞塞凡堡（Sevastopol）發動空襲。  據《路透》報導，塞...…

items.title: 扯！日本航空空服員酒測超標 航班誤點40分鐘
items.summary: 太離譜！日本航空（JAL）今（27日）表示，23日早上原定從廣島機場飛往東京羽田機場的252號航班，由於1名空服員酒測超標需要換人，使得班機誤點40分左右。  據《共同社》報...…
